name: Fridenson Logistic Services Ltd
summary: Fridenson Logistic Services Ltd provides logistics solutions worldwide. The company offers international freight forwarding services, including sea and air delivery services, third-party deliveries and projects, customs brokerage services, cargo insurance, etc.; customs clearance and marine insurance services; and land transport and crane services, as well as provides trade and financing solutions. It operates storage and cargo terminals and shipping agency. The company was formerly known as Fridenson Cranes and Trucking Ltd. and changed its name to Fridenson Logistic Services Ltd in June 2007. Fridenson Logistic Services Ltd was founded in 1975 and is based in Haifa, Israel. Fridenson Logistic Services Ltd is a subsidiary of Cambridge Holdings Ltd.
